violations.text: Ice debris was observed in the bar hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200 ppm. PIC changed container of sanitizer. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the bar dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm); the concentration for the chlorine sanitizer solution of the kitchen dishwasher was in excess of 200 ppm. Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC called for service. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026
Establishment is vacuum packing cooked pork without a variance. Variance application information provided; pork disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink in the service area was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200 ppm. PIC diluted to proper concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024
A container of cooked beets was observed marked with a date exceeding 7 days. PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the slicer had an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. PIC took unit out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024
